tasks.title: HITL approval system in Telegram bot
Dashboard WebSocket + HTTP fallback
tasks.description: Add connectWS() function: WebSocket to ws://localhost:3001/ws/health. On message parse JSON call updateAll(data). On close reconnect after 3s. Add pollHealth() as HTTP fallback: fetch /api/health every 5s if WS disconnected. Use textContent for DOM updates, never innerHTML.

tasks.title: Dashboard updateAll() API mapping
tasks.description: Add updateAll(data) function that maps API response to DOM: data.system.cpu.percent to CPU card, data.system.ram to RAM card, data.providers to providers grid using createElement, data.alerts to alerts section, data.savings to cost section. Push new data points to existing TimeChart instances.

tasks.title: Dashboard dynamic providers + SSE logs
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded providers array with fetch from /api/health/providers. Add connectSSE() via EventSource to /api/logs endpoint. Maintain logBuffer max 100 entries. renderLogs() uses createElement for each log line. Auto-scroll. Colors: INFO=green, WARN=amber, ERROR=rose.

tasks.title: CSS themes (void/paper/signal/dusk)
tasks.description: Add 3 CSS theme blocks after :root: [data-theme=paper] light bg #FAFAF8 dark text, [data-theme=signal] black bg red accent #ef4444, [data-theme=dusk] purple bg #12111A amber accent #eab308. Add 4 colored circles in header as theme switcher with localStorage persistence.

tasks.title: LiteLLM node in ArchViz
tasks.description: In ArchViz nodes array add LiteLLM node at position x:0.55 y:0.28 r:14 color:#22d3ee. Add connections router-lite and lite-ollama.

tasks.title: Settings tab in dashboard
tasks.description: Add 7th tab Settings with gear icon in sidebar. Content: endpoint list (API:3001, WS, SSE, Router:3002, OpenClaw:18789, LiteLLM:4001) with connection status dots. Theme picker. Action buttons: Cleanup, Reload, Export Logs.

tasks.title: scripts/embedding.js — Ollama embeddings
tasks.description: Create scripts/embedding.js with generateEmbedding(text) function. Fetch Ollama /api/embeddings with model nomic-embed-text. CRITICAL: immediately after, fetch /api/generate with keep_alive:0 to unload model from VRAM. Export generateEmbedding.

tasks.title: scripts/chroma.js — ChromaDB REST client
tasks.description: Create scripts/chroma.js. Pure fetch REST client for ChromaDB at localhost:8000. Functions: ensureCollection(), addDocuments(ids, embeddings, documents, metadatas), queryDocuments(embedding, nResults). No npm packages.

tasks.title: scripts/memory-mcp.js — RAG memory layer
tasks.description: Create scripts/memory-mcp.js importing from ./embedding and ./chroma. Functions: chunkText(text, size=500), smartStore(text, metadata) using for...of loop NOT Promise.all, smartRetrieve(query, k=3), injectMemory(prompt) with graceful fallback if ChromaDB unavailable.

tasks.title: ai-sdk.cjs LRU cache + LiteLLM tier
tasks.description: Add LRU cache (lru-cache npm package, max:500, ttl:30min). Add LiteLLM tier before ollama: fetch http://127.0.0.1:4001/v1/chat/completions with LITELLM_MASTER_KEY. Add litellm to CASCADE_ORDER before ollama. Cache check at start of shadowGenerate using first 200 chars as key.

tasks.title: Add Antigravity/Copilot/LiteLLM providers to health.js
tasks.description: In getProvidersStatus() add 3 providers: Antigravity (localhost:3002, type:self-hosted), Copilot CDP (type:browser, status:standby), LiteLLM Proxy (localhost:4001/health, type:proxy).
